mapper.select: SELECT trade_date, is_trading, reason, source FROM trade_calendar WHERE YEAR(trade_date) = #{year} ORDER BY trade_date
SELECT trade_date FROM trade_calendar WHERE trade_date <= #{date} AND is_trading = 1 ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT trade_date FROM trade_calendar WHERE trade_date >= #{startDate} AND trade_date <= #{endDate} AND is_trading = 1 ORDER BY trade_date
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trade_calendar WHERE trade_date > #{startDate} AND trade_date <= #{endDate} AND is_trading = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trade_calendar (trade_date, is_trading, reason, source) VALUES (#{tradeDate}, #{isTrading}, #{reason}, #{source}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_trading = #{isTrading}, reason = #{reason}, source = #{source}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
